hero.title: The best all-in-one bot for Discord
hero.subtitle: Armea is an easy-to-use and powerful Discord bot that communities rely on for management, entertainment, and growth.

custombot.title: Exclusively Yours with Armea: A Personalized Bot and Custom Profile Experience
custombot.desc: Take your server’s identity to the next level and create a unique AI assistant that represents your brand or community. Armea opens the doors to two amazing customization worlds: You can either create and integrate a completely independent, custom bot that’s fully tailored to your server’s name and theme; or you can completely overhaul the main bot’s avatar, banner, and bio to perfectly match the spirit of your community. This way, you offer your members a completely exclusive and prestigious server experience they won’t find anywhere else. Elevate your server’s professionalism and brand value to the highest level. By shaping your bot’s visual world and profile details as you wish, you can make the connection you build with your members much more professional and iconic. Whether you’re giving your server a completely independent character with your own custom bot, or decorating the main bot’s profile with your server’s colors to give it a fresh new look—with Armea, both the appearance and vision of your server will be entirely under your control.

welcome.title: Strengthen Your Connections with Armea: A Unique Welcome Experience
welcome.desc: Welcome every new member who joins your server with a warm and guiding message designed just for them. Armea offers the most prestigious way to communicate your rules, share your server’s core vision, and announce your active events. This ensures that every participant feels like a part of an inclusive and dynamic community from the very first moment, without ever feeling left out. Build a strong sense of belonging to maximize interaction among users. By ensuring your new members feel both valued and fully informed, encourage them to take an active role in your channels and contribute to the community. Whether you’re competing in a large game lobby or simply sharing a fun chat environment, with Armea, every voice on your server will feel like an indispensable part of this big family.

customcommands.title: Break Through Boundaries with Armea: An Advanced Custom Commands Experience
customcommands.desc: Break free from the constraints of standard templates and build a unique ecosystem shaped entirely by your imagination. Instead of confining you to standard bot commands, Armea empowers you to create dynamic commands, smart automated responses, and complex workflows tailored to your server’s specific needs. This allows you to automate your community’s daily routines while delivering a digital experience to your members that is entirely unique to your brand—one they won’t find anywhere else. Reduce the operational burden of server management to zero while maximizing moderation and interaction speed. You can send complex message sequences with a single trigger word, create smart responses that address members by name using advanced variables, or develop fun mini-game commands. Whether you’re setting up a support mechanism that instantly resolves recurring questions or developing humorous commands tailored to your server, with Armea, control is entirely in your hands, and your server will run like a well-oiled machine, operating by its own rules.

leveling.title: Competition and Fun with Armea: A Dynamic Level-Up Experience
leveling.desc: Turn every message, every interaction, and every chat on your server into an exciting game mechanic. Armea moves beyond ordinary messaging habits, allowing your members to earn experience points (XP) as they stay active on the server and level up through fully personalized progression. This transforms your community from a mere space for sharing information into a vibrant digital arena where everyone wants to climb to the top, with every moment rewarded. Maximize interaction and user loyalty in chat channels. Boost in-server prestige by automatically assigning special roles to members as they level up, granting them access to private channels and unique perks. Whether you’re creating a friendly competitive environment or crowning your most active members with a leaderboard, with Armea, every voice on your server will feel that their contributions add value to the community and will come to see this place as their own home.

reactionrole.title: Free Choices with Armea: An Experience with Dynamic Reaction Roles
reactionrole.desc: Give your members full control over your server and give them the freedom to design their own community experience. Armea eliminates complex role assignment processes, allowing your users to instantly claim roles that match their interests, the games they play, or their status on the server—all with just a single click on an emoji. This way, even on a server with thousands of members, you can easily optimize access so that everyone sees only the channels and notifications they want to see. Eliminate unnecessary chaos and tagging to maximize order within the server. By letting your members freely choose roles that reflect who they are, you can bring them together with the subcommunities they care about much more quickly and organically. Whether you’re unlocking new game rooms or distributing special roles for tournament and event announcements, with Armea, every interaction on your server will transform into a visually flawless and user-friendly management panel.

embeds.title: A Visual Feast with Armea: An Enhanced Embedded Messages Experience
embeds.desc: Say goodbye to plain text on your server and transform every channel you use to engage your community into a professional showcase. Armea lets you design your rules, announcements, and guides not as ordinary text, but as stylish embedded messages featuring custom color palettes, eye-catching headings, visuals, and organized fields. This way, you elevate your server’s visual identity to the highest level while ensuring that even the most critical information doesn’t go unnoticed by your members. Maximize the readability of your messages and take your server’s aesthetic to the next level. You can create a professional look by using custom color codes specific to your brand or server theme, and transform your messages into a fully interactive experience by adding logos and custom buttons. Whether you’re creating a flawless (server guide) for newcomers or announcing your most important events with a stunning launch vibe, every piece of content you share with Armea will become a design masterpiece that instantly captures your members’ attention and showcases your server’s quality.

ticket.title: Professional Support with Armea: An Advanced Ticket System Experience
ticket.desc: Leave the cries for help and complex direct message (DM) traffic on your server behind, and offer your members an enterprise-level support experience. Armea allows your users to open fully secure support channels—accessible only to themselves and authorized personnel—with a single click. This enables you to resolve your community’s issues, suggestions, or requests in a private and fully organized structure, away from the chaotic environment of general chats. Reduce your moderation team’s workload while maximizing member satisfaction and security. Categorize support requests by topic, instantly route the right request to the appropriate authorized role, and archive closed support histories (transcripts) to preserve your server storage. Whether you’re setting up a help desk to address technical issues in real time or meticulously managing new moderator applications for your server, Armea will transform your server into a reliable, flawlessly functioning hub where your members can always find a professional point of contact.

social.title: Live Streaming and Content Notifications with Armea: A Seamless Access Experience
social.desc: Break down the barriers between platforms and instantly share every piece of content you create and every live stream you launch with your community. Armea detects your live streams or video shares on platforms like Kick, YouTube, Twitch, and many others in seconds, and sends eye-catching, platform-specific announcements to your server. This ensures your followers aren’t left at the mercy of algorithms and guarantees your content reaches its intended audience from the very first second. Bring your community together in a single hub to maximize your visibility and engagement in the digital world. By displaying your stream titles, custom thumbnails, and direct participation links via sleek embedded messages on your server, encourage your members to join the live stream or like your video. Whether you’re launching an exciting Kick/Twitch stream or releasing a new video on your YouTube channel, with Armea, your server will transform into a vibrant, dynamic media hub where every piece of content you create resonates instantly.

moderation.title: Safe and Secure Servers with Armea: Advanced Moderation and AutoMod Experience
moderation.desc: Protect your server’s peace and community quality 24/7, and create an impenetrable shield against rule-breaking behavior. Armea instantly detects harmful links, profanity, spam attempts, and toxic language with AI-powered precision, lightening the load on your moderation team. This ensures your community remains safe, respectful, and inclusive for everyone—even while you sleep. Boost your operational efficiency while elevating server discipline and fairness to the highest level. With advanced AutoMod filters, automatically delete ads and inappropriate content in seconds; apply warnings, mutes, or bans to rule-breaking users through a flawless record-keeping system. Whether you’re protecting a massive community of hundreds of thousands of members from chaos or preserving the intimacy of a newly emerging boutique chat environment, with Armea, you’ll always have full control over your server, and its future will be completely secure.

partners.title: Trusted by some of the largest Discord communities

final.title: Armea: The Best All-in-One Discord Bot

welcome.title: A Unique Welcome Experience
welcome.desc: Armea welcomes new members to your server with warm and informative messages, fostering a strong sense of belonging and ensuring that users are informed from the very first moment and take an active role in the community.

levels.title: Entertainment: A Dynamic Level-Up Experience
levels.desc: Armea, which allows your members to earn XP and level up as long as they remain active, maximizes in-server interaction, prestige, and user loyalty through game mechanics such as automatic role-based rewards and leaderboards.

customcommands.title: Advanced Custom Commands Experience
customcommands.desc: By breaking free from standard bot templates and enabling you to create dynamic commands and smart automated responses tailored to your server, Armea reduces your operational workload to zero and delivers a completely unique and seamless digital experience for your community.

moderation.title: Secure and Reliable Servers
moderation.desc: Take security and peace of mind to the next level on your servers with Armea. With advanced moderation tools and the intelligent AutoMod system, we keep your community protected at all times while streamlining complex management processes. Creating a seamless and reliable digital environment for your members has never been easier; Armea delivers the professional protection your community needs, down to every detail.

customCommands.allowedRolesHint: Empty = everyone. If set, only these roles can use the command.
customCommands.deniedRolesHint: Users with these roles cannot use the command.

admin.muteRolesHint: Members with these roles can use the mute command.
admin.jailRolesHint: Members with these roles can use the jail command.
admin.immuneRolesHint: Members with these roles cannot be moderated.

terms.pageDesc: Read Armea's Terms of Service to understand the rules and guidelines for using our platform.
terms.title: Terms of Service

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing or using Armea (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service. These terms apply to all users, including server administrators and members.

service.title: 2. Description of Service
service.body: Armea is a Discord bot and web dashboard that provides server management, moderation, leveling, and other community tools. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the Service at any time without prior notice.

account.title: 3. Account Responsibility
account.body: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your Discord account and any servers you manage through Armea. You must not share your authentication credentials or allow unauthorized access to your account. You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account.

conduct.title: 4. Acceptable Use
conduct.body: You agree not to use the Service to:
items: Violate Discord's Terms of Service or Community Guidelines
Harass, abuse, or harm other users
Distribute spam, malware, or malicious content
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Service
Use the Service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of the Service

premium.title: 5. Premium Subscriptions
premium.body: Premium features are available through paid subscriptions. Payments are processed securely and are subject to our refund policy. Premium subscriptions are transferable between servers as described in the dashboard. We reserve the right to change pricing with reasonable notice.

termination.title: 6. Termination
termination.body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time, with or without cause, and with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease.

disclaimer.title: 7. Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.body: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of harmful components. Your use of the Service is at your sole risk.

changes.title: 8. Changes to Terms
changes.body: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify users of significant changes by updating the date at the top of this page. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.body: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through our support server or via the contact options available on our website.

privacy.pageDesc: Learn how Armea collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.body: Armea ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our Discord bot and web dashboard. Please read this policy carefully.

collect.title: 2. Information We Collect
collect.body: We collect the following types of information:
items: Discord user ID, username, and avatar (provided via Discord OAuth)
Server (guild) IDs and names for servers where Armea is installed
Configuration data you set through the dashboard (module settings, custom commands, etc.)
Usage data such as command interactions and feature usage statistics
XP and leveling data for members in servers using the leveling feature

use.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
use.body: We use the collected information to:
items: Provide and operate the Armea bot and dashboard services
Authenticate users and manage server permissions
Store and apply your server configuration settings
Improve and develop new features for the Service
Respond to support requests and troubleshoot issues
Ensure compliance with our Terms of Service

sharing.title: 4. Information Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information with trusted service providers who assist us in operating the Service, provided they agree to keep this information confidential. We may also disclose information when required by law or to protect our rights.

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.body: We retain your data for as long as your server uses Armea or as needed to provide the Service. You may request deletion of your data by removing Armea from your server and contacting us. Some data may be retained for legal or operational purposes.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.body: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:
items: Right to access the personal data we hold about you
Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete data
Right to request deletion of your personal data
Right to object to or restrict processing of your data
Right to data portability

security.title: 7. Security
security.body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. Bot tokens are encrypted using AES-256-GCM and are never stored in plain text. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

children.title: 8. Children's Privacy
children.body: The Service is not directed to children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe we have inadvertently collected such information, please contact us immediately.

changes.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify users of significant changes by updating the date at the top of this page. Your continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: 10. Contact Us
contact.body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data rights, please contact us through our support server or via the contact options available on our website.

cookies.pageDesc: Learn about how Armea uses cookies and similar technologies.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy

what.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
what.body: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience. We use cookies and similar technologies on our web dashboard.

how.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
how.body: Armea uses cookies to maintain your authentication session, remember your language preference, and ensure the dashboard functions correctly. We do not use cookies for advertising or tracking purposes.

types.title: 3. Types of Cookies We Use
types.body: The following table describes the cookies used by Armea:

rows.purpose: Keeps you logged in to the dashboard via Discord OAuth

control.title: 4. Controlling Cookies
control.body: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to refuse cookies or delete existing ones. Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of the Armea dashboard, particularly authentication features.

thirdparty.title: 5. Third-Party Cookies
thirdparty.body: We use Discord's OAuth service for authentication, which may set its own cookies. We do not control these third-party cookies. Please refer to Discord's Privacy Policy for more information about how they use cookies.

changes.title: 6. Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be reflected by updating the date at the top of this page.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.body: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us through our support server or via the contact options available on our website.
